profile.name: Sahana Bhaskar
profile.headline: Software Engineer | AI/ML, Full-Stack, iOS, Cloud
summary_facts: Software engineer with about 3 years of experience building full-stack, iOS, backend, cloud, and AI-powered systems.
MS Computer Science thesis student at Virginia Tech with 4.0 GPA; BS Computer Science from BMS College of Engineering with department silver medalist recognition.
Published work includes ACM ICER 2025 research on answer-aware LLM hints and IEEE INOCON 2020 work on e-commerce demand forecasting.

education.degree: Master of Science in Computer Science
Bachelor of Engineering in Computer and Information Science

publications: Designing Answer-Aware LLM Hints to Scaffold Deeper Learning in K-12 Programming Education, ACM ICER 2025
Demand Forecasting for E-Commerce Platforms, IEEE INOCON 2020
awards: Department Silver Medalist, BMS College of Engineering, 2021
certifications_training: Generative AI with LLMs on DeepLearning.AI / Coursera by Andrew Ng
LLM Engineering: Master AI & Agents on Udemy
Google Cloud Professional - Architecting with Google Compute Engine Specialization

bullets.text: Designed and deployed an answer-aware LLM hint generation system using GPT-4-Turbo, FastAPI, and PostgreSQL with engineered prompt templates to guide K-12 student reasoning without answer leakage; published at ACM ICER 2025.

Built a multi-layered evaluation framework combining semantic similarity, LLM-as-judge scoring, and statistical analysis on student surveys across 105 students, achieving 98.1% content alignment and HQS of 0.749.

Selected GPT-4-Turbo over open-source alternatives including LLaMA-2 and Mistral based on leakage analysis; validated mean hint-answer cosine similarity of 0.26 and LLM-as-judge pedagogy score of 0.958.
Implemented a Kubernetes CronJob on a GKE cluster to automate PostgreSQL database backups, diagnosing failed volume mounts and improving reliability of cloud-hosted infrastructure.
Built a GitHub Actions CI/CD pipeline to run tests on pull requests, build Docker images, and deploy validated changes to Google Kubernetes Engine, ensuring only tested code reached production.
Built student-facing UI using Angular and TypeScript, integrating FastAPI REST APIs to deliver real-time LLM hints.
Developed an adaptive learning system using Q-learning for personalized activity book recommendations based on student performance.
Implemented least-privilege access control using IAM roles and policies, improving system security for the cloud-hosted learning platform.
Designed and deployed an LLM-powered hint generation system using FastAPI and TypeScript, validated through human surveys and published at ICER 2025.

experience.title: Graduate Research Assistant, Machine Learning Lab

bullets.text: Designed feature engineering and data processing pipelines using RDKit for time-series regression on the NIST17 chromatography dataset; trained a regression model achieving R2 = 0.986 for retention time prediction and chemical compound identification.

experience.title: Graduate Teaching Assistant, Intro to Computer Networking

bullets.text: Mentored 100+ students in TCP/IP, DNS, routing, congestion control, and distributed networking concepts through hands-on debugging and network troubleshooting labs.
Conducted packet-level analysis using Wireshark and Cisco Packet Tracer to diagnose latency, packet flow, protocol behavior, and SSL/TLS communication patterns across simulated distributed systems.
Led end-to-end iOS feature development for TATA CLiQ Palette, a live social e-commerce app, using Swift, UIKit, and MVVM.
Designed and developed Java Spring Boot REST APIs and microservices for product catalog, cart, and checkout systems, serving 3M+ daily requests.
Improved API performance using Redis caching, Java concurrency concepts, and efficient database access patterns, reducing response time by about 60% from 200ms to 30ms.
Engineered cursor-based pagination and rate limiting for the PALETTE social feed, supporting infinite scroll of 50 posts per call.
Built secure services using JWT authentication and token-based authorization, improving API reliability across checkout systems.
Containerized Spring Boot catalog and cart microservices using Docker, enabling consistent deployments across development, staging, and production environments.
Automated XCTest/XCUITest test suites with 95%+ coverage and integrated Bitrise CI/CD with TestFlight for beta testing and releases.
Raised crash-free users from 90% to 98% by systematic profiling with Instruments, Memory Profiling, and Firebase Crashlytics.
Reduced user-reported UI issues by 40% by enforcing Apple HIG compliance and Dynamic Type accessibility standards in close collaboration with Product and Design.
Built reusable UIKit/SwiftUI component library and standardized networking SDK, replacing Alamofire and accelerating feature development by about 2 months across multiple apps.
Awarded Tech Champion for analytics-driven product improvements using CleverTap, Omniture, and AppsFlyer.
Resolved production escalations by performing root cause analysis and implementing fixes to maintain system reliability across mobile and backend workflows.
Worked across development, staging, and production environments to ensure smooth deployments and system stability.
Built a Java Spring Boot e-commerce demo app using MVC and microservices for user, cart, and order services with REST APIs and MySQL.
Built and shipped a large-scale e-commerce application, contributing to end-to-end system development.
Designed and developed Spring Boot REST APIs serving 3M+ daily requests; engineered cursor-based pagination and Redis caching on catalog endpoints, cutting response time by 60% from 200ms to 30ms.
Containerized microservices with Docker across dev, staging, and production; automated CI/CD with Bitrise and maintained 95%+ test coverage via XCTest/XCUITest.
Leveraged analytics using CleverTap, Omniture, and AppsFlyer to drive data-informed improvements in engagement and retention.
Reduced critical user-reported UI issues by 40% by collaborating with Product and Design to ensure Apple HIG compliance.
Reduced cost per transaction by 10.47% for TATA CLiQ Luxury with 56K+ active users by building a self-serve module.
Built two in-house SDKs, a networking SDK and a UIKit/SwiftUI design system, accelerating development by 2 months.
Improved app responsiveness and background processing using Grand Central Dispatch and async/await for efficient concurrency.
Resolved memory leaks and retain cycles caused by strong reference cycles in closures and delegate patterns by auditing with Instruments and applying weak self / unowned self capture lists.
Built a self-serve feature for a live e-commerce platform with 56K+ users, reducing cost per transaction by 10.47%.
Developed backend APIs using Java Spring Boot and MySQL, supporting scalable system integration.

Implemented a Python-based CWMP (TR-069) device management workflow enabling an Auto Configuration Server to remotely monitor, evaluate, and update Customer Premises Equipment configurations over SOAP/HTTP.
Debugged device communication and configuration workflows across distributed networked systems, improving reliability of remote device provisioning and lifecycle management.
Implemented a CWMP (TR-069) device management workflow using Python and SOAP/HTTP, enabling an Auto Configuration Server to remotely evaluate and update Customer Premises Equipment configurations.

Developed a predictive demand forecasting tool using SARIMA and LSTM models with RMSE 1.24 for e-commerce inventory planning, reducing stockouts and overproduction; published results at IEEE INOCON 2020.

projects.name: Autonomous Multi-Agent System for Trading Insights

bullets.text: Built a multi-agent orchestration system for financial analysis with autonomous task execution, contextual reasoning, and dynamic workflow coordination across agents using real-time financial APIs.
Designed agentic execution pipelines with tool-calling workflows, state-aware context handling, asynchronous task orchestration, and multi-agent routing.

projects.name: Query Optimization and Semantic Parsing Service

bullets.text: Built a 3-model hybrid Text-to-SQL pipeline using Qwen-Instruct for SQL generation, StarCoder 1B for syntax refinement, and DeepSeek-R1 for reasoning optimization, benchmarked across Spider, Spider 2.0 Lite, GeoQuery, and CoSQL datasets.

Pipeline outperformed all single-model baselines, achieving JPS 0.77 on Spider and 0.86 on GeoQuery; conducted ablation studies per model and evaluated a RAG approach using Vanna.AI with ChromaDB vector store.

Built a full-stack AI campus chatbot using the MERN stack with PropelAuth authentication and a RAG pipeline using MongoDB Atlas vector search and GPT-4-Turbo for context-aware responses to student queries.
Designed backend retrieval pipelines and semantic chunking for low-latency, context-aware query responses.

projects.name: Medical Image Segmentation with Text-Enhanced Vision Transformers

bullets.text: Built a text-enhanced CNN-ViT hybrid for medical image segmentation using language cross-attention to align radiological text with image features for pixel-wise guidance.
Evaluated BioBERT, ClinicalBERT, and BERT-base with custom Weighted Dice plus Focal Loss; ClinicalBERT achieved 82.25% Dice and 73.19% IoU on QaTa-COV19, outperforming U-Net, LAVT, and ConVIRT.

projects.name: Segmentation of Electronic Thesis and Dissertation

bullets.text: Integrated YOLOv7 into an ETL pipeline to extract metadata, figures, chapters, and table of contents from about 334K Virginia Tech electronic theses, enabling parallel large-scale topic modeling with a Kafka producer-consumer service.

Developed a Java-based web application using JSP, MySQL, and Apache Tomcat for 250+ faculty, applying object-oriented programming principles and relational database design to digitize evaluation workflows and reduce processing time by 20%.
Developed a Linux command-line automation tool using C++, curl, grep, awk, and sed to extract, parse, and process structured Wikipedia content through shell-based workflows.
Integrated C++ with Unix shell utilities for automated text transformation, exception handling, and export into CSV/TXT formats for downstream analysis.

projects.name: Music Player - Advanced CLI Music Application

bullets.text: Developed a Unix-based CLI music application in C++ using filesystem APIs, file I/O, directory traversal, and modular command parsing to automate music library organization.
Implemented metadata-based song categorization with structured memory management and exception handling to ensure reliable execution in Unix environments.

Built an AI-powered iOS travel companion for solo travelers and women's safety, using OpenAI API to generate location-aware safety summaries for unfamiliar neighborhoods with MapKit for area exploration.
Implemented asynchronous networking using URLSession and Swift concurrency with CoreData offline caching to deliver low-latency safety insights without connectivity.
Designed a travel-networking app applying agglomerative clustering to group Marriott guests by shared interests, earning runner-up in product innovation and UX design.
Built real-time guest discovery with Firestore live listeners, Firebase Auth, async/await networking, and a responsive AutoLayout interface using custom UITableView cells.
Forked the open-source Flo iOS music player and extended it with lyrics support, self-hosting .lrc timestamped lyrics files on a private server and exposing a custom REST endpoint.
Implemented the lyrics fetch layer using URLSession, parsing .lrc timestamp format line-by-line and syncing each lyric to playback position for a karaoke-style display.
